<!--
Thank you for contributing to Lychee NSFW Classification! We only accept PRs to the master branch.

Please describe the benefit to end users and confirm the change does not break existing features.

If you're pushing a Feature:
- Title it: "Add: feature description"
- Describe what the new feature enables
- Add tests to cover the new functionality
- Ensure it doesn't break any existing features

If you're pushing a Fix:
- Title it: "Fix: bug description"
- If it fixes an existing issue, start the description with `fixes #xxxx`
- Describe how it fixes the problem in a few words
- Add a test that triggered the bug before the fix
- Ensure it doesn't break any existing feature

All Pull Requests must pass:
- `make lint` (ruff check + ruff format --check + ty check)
- `make test` (pytest)

You can run these locally before opening the PR — they are required to pass for acceptance.
-->
